mapper.select: SELECT r.*, u.id as u_id, u.username as u_username, u.nickname as u_nickname, u.avatar_url as u_avatar FROM review r LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON r.user_id = u.id WHERE r.good_id = #{goodId} AND r.status = #{status} ORDER BY r.create_time DESC, r.like_count DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}

SELECT r.*, u.id as u_id, u.username as u_username, u.nickname as u_nickname, u.avatar_url as u_avatar FROM review r LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON r.user_id = u.id WHERE r.user_id = #{userId} AND r.status = #{status} ORDER BY r.create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}

SELECT COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN rating = 5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as rating_5_count, SUM(CASE WHEN rating = 4 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as rating_4_count, SUM(CASE WHEN rating = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as rating_3_count, SUM(CASE WHEN rating = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as rating_2_count, SUM(CASE WHEN rating = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as rating_1_count, AVG(rating) as avg_rating FROM review WHERE good_id = #{goodId} AND status = #{status}
SELECT * FROM review WHERE good_id = #{goodId} AND rating = 5 AND status = 1 ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT r.*, u.id as u_id, u.username as u_username, u.nickname as u_nickname, u.avatar_url as u_avatar FROM review r LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON r.user_id = u.id WHERE r.good_id = #{goodId} AND r.status = #{status} ORDER BY r.create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT r.*, u.id as u_id, u.username as u_username, u.nickname as u_nickname, u.avatar_url as u_avatar FROM review r LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON r.user_id = u.id WHERE r.good_id = #{goodId} AND r.status = #{status} ORDER BY r.like_count DESC, r.create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT r.*, u.id as u_id, u.username as u_username, u.nickname as u_nickname, u.avatar_url as u_avatar FROM review r LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON r.user_id = u.id WHERE r.good_id = #{goodId} AND r.status = #{status} AND r.images IS NOT NULL AND r.images != '' ORDER BY r.create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE good g LEFT JOIN ( SELECT good_id, COUNT(*) as review_count, AVG(rating) as good_rating, SUM(CASE WHEN rating = 5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as rating_5_count, SUM(CASE WHEN rating = 4 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as rating_4_count, SUM(CASE WHEN rating = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as rating_3_count, SUM(CASE WHEN rating = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as rating_2_count, SUM(CASE WHEN rating = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as rating_1_count FROM review WHERE good_id = #{goodId} AND status = 1 GROUP BY good_id ) r ON g.id = r.good_id SET g.review_count = IFNULL(r.review_count, 0), g.good_rating = IFNULL(r.good_rating, 5.00), g.rating_5_count = IFNULL(r.rating_5_count, 0), g.rating_4_count = IFNULL(r.rating_4_count, 0), g.rating_3_count = IFNULL(r.rating_3_count, 0), g.rating_2_count = IFNULL(r.rating_2_count, 0), g.rating_1_count = IFNULL(r.rating_1_count, 0) WHERE g.id = #{goodId}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO review (user_id, good_id, order_id, rating, content, images, tags, status) VALUES
(#{item.userId}, #{item.goodId}, #{item.orderId}, #{item.rating}, #{item.content}, #{item.images}, #{item.tags}, #{item.status})
mapper.select: SELECT rating, COUNT(*) as count, ROUND(COUNT(*) * 100.0 / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM review WHERE status = 1 AND good_id = #{goodId} ), 2) as percentage FROM review WHERE status = 1 AND good_id = #{goodId} GROUP BY rating ORDER BY rating DESC
